name: Nova
description: Nova is a striking Silver Shaded female with an ice-white undercoat and luminous green eyes. She is gentle, affectionate, and loves to perch on the highest shelf. Fully socialized with children and dogs.
healthTesting: HCM echocardiogram: Clear. PKD1 DNA: Clear. SMA DNA: Clear. FIV/FeLV: Negative. Microchipped. FVRCP ×2. Dewormed ×3.
